property.name: showActionSlot
property.label: Show Action Slot
property.description: Determines whether the Action slot is displayed in the header.

property.name: isMobilePhone
property.label: Show Mobile Phone Slots
property.description: Force the mobile layout to expose mobile-only drawer slots (Drawer-Logo, Drawer-Country-Selector, Drawer-User-Menu, Drawer-Logo-Body, Drawer-Action) for configuration. Disable after adding content; the mobile layout is applied automatically on screens 600px or smaller.
